posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — Not available on kite. On a streak, you may set an alert based on these indicators. Z-Connect by Zerodha – 17 Jan 24 Zerodha users now have unlimited access to Streak Streak Unlimited is now accessible to all Zerodha users. With Streak you can easily create scanners and also build, backtest, and deploy technical analysis-based strategies across equities and F&O. Est. reading time: 5 minutes

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — Currently, there is no provision to customise this. This is slightly tricky to handle within the TradingView library, but we will review the feasibility.

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — We will review displaying this as a column on the position page table. We reviewed this. The Up/Down key with C addresses a similar requirement, so this may not be feasible for now.

posts.author: FXX991
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — @Arockiya_Raja Appreciate Very Much for all your efforts in developing an Excellent Trading Terminal. The beauty is, given freedom to traders to build their Terminal according to their preferences. I have few requirements as listed below: Provide one blank work space in Widgets as “Default” . The reason for this is , trader can drag any POP UP like Order Window from OPTION CHAIN to this Default Blank Work space. Enable ORDER WINDOW Widget to drag and pull it to any area in the workspace and also enable the Order Depth to display on top or on Right Sid…

posts.author: Abhi_001
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — Cant we have day change in Position tab also? the way we have in holding tab. Its very difficult to track the day movement when you are holding F&O overnight positions in 15-20 different trades.

posts.author: ketub
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — the scalper order window, instead of having it horizontally if i want to put it in a vertical pane i cant, i want to be able to have the call and put windows one below other

posts.author: ketub
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — if you look at the mobile app option chain widget with greeks it has this nice scroll which keeps the same greek on call and put side in view when scrolled. i am expecting similar on web as well.

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — Currently, the scalper order window widget links CE to the 2nd box and PE to the 3rd box of the chart by default. No provision to customise it. Your feedback has been noted. By default, the scalper workspace opens with the ATM strikes. It works with a manually arranged workspace as well. Could you DM your client ID? I will arrange a callback to assist with this.

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — The Greeks are displayed automatically when the widget has enough width. In a narrower responsive layout, showing them forcefully would add a scrollbar, so we are keeping it adaptive. The OI widget’s responsive view can be improved, I believe. We will look into this.

posts.author: niftymonk
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — Yes, I’m facing the same issue. When widgets are resized to smaller dimensions, they don’t adapt properly. The open interest widget looks fine on a larger screen, but its usability degrades significantly when reduced to a smaller view.

posts.author: ketub
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — the widgets are not responsive, for example take the option chain widget, if you put the option chain in a vertical window you do not see most of the greeks, there is no scrollbar for scrolling either.

posts.author: jkp
posts.text: Introducing Terminal Mode on Kite - Beta — Few things that i wish to see on Zerodha Terminal mode Deeper black theme, just like on kite mobile app (or ability to choose different themes) On scalper mode, please add option to choose ATM,ITM and OTM just like on 915 by Groww, instead of long list of option contracts on both sides. It helps in choosing the option contracts easily. A keyboard shortcut to change to market order and limit order on scalper mode (if we remove buy sell buttons from the chart). Option to add OI profile inside Nifty chart. By the way, all these are available on other bro…
